---
title: "05_prelim_res"
author: "Jagadeesh Puvvula"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: pdf_document
---

#load clean analytic data
```{r}
analy_df <- read_csv("~/Documents/k99_home/data/analytic_data_for_analysis.csv") |>
  select(-c(visit)) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor),
         parity_n = as.factor(parity_n)) |>
  rename(
    # BASC
    "BASC-BSI"       = basc_bsi,
    "BASC-EXT"       = basc_ext,
    "BASC-INZ"       = basc_inz,
    # Covariates
    "Sex"            = sex,
    "Race"           = race,
    "Marital-Status" = mari_st,
    "Mom-Education"  = mom_edu,
    "HOME-Score"     = home_score_total,
    "Mom-Age"        = mom_age_deliv,
    "Gest-Age"       = gest_age,
    # OPEs
    "BCEP"           = BCEtP,
    "DNBP"           = DBuP,
    "DPHP"           = DPhP,
    "BDCIPP"         = BDCPP
  )
```

#summaries of variables of interest
```{r}
cont_summary <- analy_df |>
  select(28:60) |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  summarise(across(
    everything(),
    ~paste0(
      round(median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
      " (",
      round(quantile(.x, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE), 2), ", ",
      round(quantile(.x, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE), 2), ")"
    )
  )) |>
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "Median_IQR"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    n_obs = sapply(analy_df[28:60][, variable], function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))
  )

cat_summary <- analy_df |>
  select(28:60) |>
  select(where(is.factor)) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "variable",
               values_to = "value") |>
  count(variable, value) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(
    percent = round(100 * n / sum(n),1),
    result = paste0(n, " (", percent, "%)")
  ) |>
  select(variable, category = value, result)
```

#correlation heatmap between exposures and outcome variables
```{r}
# --- 2. Compute Correlation Matrix ---
cor_matrix <- analy_df |>
  select(28:60) |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

cor_matrix_melt <- melt(cor_matrix)

# --- 3. Prepare Long Format (exposure-outcome pairs only) ---
outcomes <- c("BASC-BSI", "BASC-EXT", "BASC-INZ")

cor_long_filtered <- cor_matrix_melt %>%
  rename(correlation = value) %>%
  mutate(
    Var1       = toupper(gsub("_", "-", as.character(Var1))),
    Var2       = toupper(gsub("_", "-", as.character(Var2))),
    size_value = 1
  ) %>%
  # Keep only pairs where exactly one variable is an outcome
  filter(
    (Var1 %in% outcomes & !Var2 %in% outcomes) |
    (!Var1 %in% outcomes & Var2 %in% outcomes)
  ) %>%
  # filter(abs(correlation) > 0.1) %>%   # uncomment to reduce clutter
  select(Var1, Var2, size_value, correlation)

# --- 4. Define Variable Groupings ---
group_list <- list(
  OPEs       = c("DPHP", "DNBP", "BCEP", "BDCIPP"),
  PBDEs      = c("PBDE100", "PBDE153", "PBDE28", "PBDE47", "PBDE99"),
  Phenols    = c("BPA"),
  Phthalates = c("MBP", "MBZP", "MCPP", "MECPP", "MEHHP", "MEHP", "MEOHP", "MEP", "MIBP"),
  Other      = c("COTININE"),
  Covariates = c("HOME-SCORE", "MOM-AGE", "GEST-AGE"),
  BASC       = c("BASC-BSI", "BASC-EXT", "BASC-INZ")
)

# --- 5. Sector Order ---
all_sectors <- unique(c(cor_long_filtered$Var1, cor_long_filtered$Var2))

sector_order_filtered <- unlist(group_list, use.names = FALSE)
sector_order_filtered <- sector_order_filtered[sector_order_filtered %in% all_sectors]

# Diagnostic — uncomment if sector name errors appear
# print(setdiff(all_sectors, unlist(group_list)))  # in data but missing from group_list
# print(setdiff(unlist(group_list), all_sectors))  # in group_list but not in data

# --- 6. Color Assignment ---
manual_palette <- c(
  OPEs       = "olivedrab4",
  PBDEs      = "mediumblue",
  Phenols    = "#17BECF",
  Phthalates = "green4",
  Other      = "#FF00FF",
  Covariates = "#7F7F7F",
  BASC       = "darkgoldenrod3"
)

grid_colors_final <- setNames(rep(NA, length(all_sectors)), all_sectors)
for (g_name in names(group_list)) {
  match_vars <- group_list[[g_name]][group_list[[g_name]] %in% all_sectors]
  grid_colors_final[match_vars] <- manual_palette[g_name]
}

group_colors_filtered <- grid_colors_final[sector_order_filtered]
group_colors_filtered <- group_colors_filtered[!is.na(group_colors_filtered)]

# --- 7. Chord Color Scale ---
col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-0.18, 0, 0.18), c("darkred", "#FFFFFF00", "darkblue"))

# --- 8. Save Plot ---
output_path <- path.expand("~/Documents/k99_home/results/")
if (!dir.exists(output_path)) dir.create(output_path, recursive = TRUE)
output_file <- paste0(output_path, "correlation_chord_diagram.tiff")

tiff(output_file, res = 300, width = 12.5, height = 12.5, units = "in", bg = "white")

par(mar = c(1, 1, 1, 1))
circos.par(start.degree = 90, gap.degree = 2, track.margin = c(0.01, 0.01))

chordDiagram(
  cor_long_filtered[, c("Var1", "Var2", "size_value")],
  order             = sector_order_filtered,
  transparency      = 0,
  col               = col_fun(cor_long_filtered$correlation),
  annotationTrack   = "grid",
  grid.col          = group_colors_filtered,
  preAllocateTracks = list(track.height = 0.1),
  directional       = 0,
  symmetric         = TRUE,
  reduce            = 0
)

circos.track(
  track.index = 1,
  panel.fun = function(x, y) {
    xlim        <- get.cell.meta.data("xlim")
    ylim        <- get.cell.meta.data("ylim")
    sector.name <- get.cell.meta.data("sector.index")
    label_color <- group_colors_filtered[sector.name]
    circos.text(
      mean(xlim), ylim[1] + 0.1,
      sector.name,
      facing     = "clockwise",
      niceFacing = TRUE,
      adj        = c(0, 0.5),
      cex        = 0.9,
      col        = label_color
    )
  },
  bg.border = NA
)

circos.clear()
invisible(dev.off())
message(paste("Saved to:", output_file))
```
